---
title: "Research"
sidebar: false
toc: false
css: ../css/research.css
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pub-conferences-listing
    contents: publications-conference.yml
    sort: [year desc]
    page-size: 10
    type: table
    categories: false
    template: research.ejs
  - id: pub-arxiv-listing
    contents: publications-arxiv.yml
    sort: [year desc]
    page-size: 10
    type: table
    categories: false
    template: research.ejs
---



[DBLP](https://dblp.org/pid/408/9301.html) ⸱ [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XoElxocAAAAJ&hl=en) ⸱ [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0009-7137-5305)

<!-- :::{.column-body} -->

<p>&nbsp;</p>

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Conference Publications

::: {#pub-conferences-listing}
:::

## arXiv

::: {#pub-arxiv-listing}
:::

:::


<!-- ::: -->
<!-- end column -->
